purpose: Describe how MCP can acquire and generate local neoforge source evidence for Minecraft 26.1 without distributing source code in mdm-sources.

expectedSteps: resolve loader Maven or Gradle metadata from the local workspace or user-approved remote metadata
ask for explicit user confirmation before acquiring or generating source artifacts
download or generate the local source package in the MCP runtime cache
derive optional source indexes or snippets only in runtime-private cache
avoid committing generated source or indexes to mdm-sources

provenance.metadataSource: Mojang version metadata and MCP runtime acquisition providers

cacheOwnership.workspaceIndependence: Generated source artifacts must not be stored inside user workspaces unless explicitly exported by the user.

queryHints.agentGuidance: Use this profile to request local neoforge source generation or to explain why no neoforge source package is currently cached. Do not treat this profile as source content.

legalNotes: This profile is not a redistributable Minecraft source artifact.
Full source packages, remapped source trees, source indexes, and snippets must be acquired or generated locally with user confirmation.
